name: The Nimble Thief
description: As you navigate the crowded street, a small figure in a tattered cloak bumps into you and tries to disappear into the crowd.

rogue-intuition.text: Something feels off, but you can't place what.

choices.label: [Rogue] Your street-smarts tingle. You grab for your purse.
Shrug it off and keep walking.

catch-thief.text: You grab the wrist of a young boy just as his hand leaves your purse. He freezes, looking up at you with wide, terrified eyes.

choices.label: [Good] Let him go with a warning.
[Influence 14] 'You shouldn't have to steal to eat.' (Offer Charity)
[Lawful] Hand him over to the city watch.
[Resolve 12] Scare him into giving up his other loot.

good-warning.text: He looks relieved and vanishes into the alleyways before you can change your mind.

charity.text: You hand the boy 10 gold pieces. He is stunned, whispers 'Thank you, Saint' before vanishing.

lawful-watch.text: You drag him to the nearest guard post. Order must be maintained. The guard hands you a small finder's fee.

scare-check.success_text: The boy trembles and hands over a silver ring he pinched earlier. He then bolts away.
scare-check.failure_text: He kicks your shin and wiggles free, disappearing into the crowd.

lose-gold.text: The figure is gone before you even realize your coin purse feels lighter.
